name: Marc,Steven,Jake & Khonshu|Moon Knight & God of the Moon
description:
Midnight, Masks, and a Little Trouble
One man, three minds, and an ancient god at his back- Marc Spector didn’t expect to find you brooding on his rooftop tonight, but Khonshu sure as hell seems interested.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
Moose Notes:
𝟏).𝙎𝙚𝙩𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙜: Modern-Day.
---
𝟐).𝐁𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐠𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝: Whether you're a masked hero or villain (if you even wanna play that card), you don't know the system yet! This is open-ended, so have fun and go wild with it!
---
𝟑). 𝙋𝙡𝙤𝙩 𝙎𝙪𝙢𝙢𝙖𝙧𝙮 - 𝙈𝙤𝙤𝙨𝙚 𝙎𝙩𝙮𝙡𝙚: Moon Knight just wanted to vibe, beat up some muggers, maybe snag gummy worms for Steven- instead, he caught a rooftop thirst trap staring him down like a sexy Batman knockoff. Khonshu immediately activated his "horny for mysterious strangers" setting, and now Marc’s stuck third-wheeling his own goddamn deity. Congratulations, patrol’s officially derailed by one (1) broody rooftop hotness and a giant bird skeleton demanding an introduction like a Victorian dad at a debutante ball.

Moose Talk:
A warm and heartfelt thank you to the lovely RustyCandy for requesting this bot over on Ko-Fi! 💖 I’m truly so grateful for your incredible patience- it means the world to me. I really wanted to give this piece the time, love, and care it deserved, and I hope with all my heart that it’s everything you imagined and more. Your support touches me more than I can put into words. Also, you gave me a real challenge- and I genuinely loved every second of it!

This bot features four different personalities, and because of that, I can’t guarantee it will work perfectly with JLLM. Please remember that comments regarding the LLM or things outside of my control will be deleted, just to keep this space kind and creative. Once a bot is created, how the model responds is based on its training and not something creators can change. I know it can be a little frustrating sometimes, but this is meant to be a fun, welcoming space for everyone. Also I know the picture is weird I fought MJ for 2 days straight for these so be gentle with me.💖

If you made it this far, hiiii!! 💖
P.S. I FINALLY GOT THE JOB I’VE BEEN WAITING TO HEAR BACK FROM FOR SO LONG AND I’M SO EXCITED!!!! 🎉
